title: Exponential Input; Gain and Phase Lag
content:
« Previous | Next »
Session Overview In this session we will study the special case of a linear first order constant coefficient with the input function an exponential. Converting sinusoids to complex exponentials will allow us to handle the very important case of sinusoidal input.
Session Activities Read the course notes:
